A 16 Praline árnyalat finom rózsás-barna tónust kínál, amely tökéletes a mindennapi sminkhez. 	Se silikonovou formou ve tvaru kočky z kolekce Babiččin statek připravíte hravé dezerty a dorty. items.desc: Teszter SIXTOL Mechanic Fluid Tester One Fékfolyadék teszter:The SIXTOL MECHANIC FLUID TESTER ONE is a compact and handy tool for quick and easy detection of the water content in brake fluid. Thanks to a pair of metal p…
items.raw_desc: Teszter SIXTOL Mechanic Fluid Tester One Fékfolyadék teszter:The SIXTOL MECHANIC FLUID TESTER ONE is a compact and handy tool for quick and easy detection of the water content in brake fluid. Thanks to a pair of metal probes and five coloured LEDs, it allows an immediate assessment of the liquid level from 0% to more than 4% water. At the touch of a button, dip the probes into the tank and the result is immediately displayed on a clear indication. The tester is designed for standard DOT 3, DOT 4 and DOT 5.1 glycol fluids and is ideal for workshop, service and home use. Thanks to the clip on the body of the device, it can be easily attached to your pocket and always be at hand.  The tester is powered by a standard AAA 1.5V battery (not included), so it is ready to use without the need for additional accessories.                     Key Features of the SIXTOL Mechanic Fluid Tester OneQuick orientation check - dip the probe and read the LED, result in a flashFive LEDs with bright scale 0% / <1% / 2% / 3% / >4%Compatible with DOT 3/4/5.1 (glycol fluids)Compact...

items.raw_desc: Utánfutó kiegészítő MULTIPA 161/251 ráfutófék porvédő:Rubber cap, dust cap for AL-KO type 161/251 ramp brakes. The rubber sleeve is designed to protect the pulling tube of the AL-KO 161S and 251S ramp brake from weather and dirt. We recommend replacing a cracked or otherwise damaged cuff as soon as possible. Otherwise, a rusted or dirty towing tube will quickly damage the ramp brake bushings. The rear circular hole of the cuff is fitted with a protrusion on the inside for inserting the cuff into the groove of the ramp brake sleeve (the diameter of the sleeve inside the groove is 60 mm). The front part of the cuff is specially shaped to surround the ball coupling mounted on the towing tube. There are two tabs on the side of the cuff designed to thread the cuff over the head and nut of the rear coupling bolt. The total length of the cuff in the extended working position on the ramp brake is approx. 12.5 cm. Dimensions:  56 mm (diameter 1) x 60 mm (diameter 2) x 125 mm ( length )

Its top part is extra soft and easily adapts to the baby's palate, while the flat bottom leaves plenty of room for the tongue and its natural movement. The extra thin and narrow teat neck relieves the jaw and first teeth. The disc with extra large ventilation holes allows maximum airflow around the mouth, helping to reduce moisture and prevent irritation of sensitive skin. The pacifier is equipped with a light element that makes it easy to find in the dark without disturbing the baby.
